steps.title: Identify points above the line
steps.content:
A point's actual $y$-value is greater than the predicted $y$-value when the point lies above the line of best fit.

Counting carefully on the scatterplot, 5 of the 9 data points sit above the line.

steps.title: Match the count
steps.content:
5 points above the line.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
